'''padhuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ign|ign]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ign|ign]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| padhuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædhiyith|pædhiyith]] || [[word:pædhiyij|pædhiyij]] || [[word:pædhiyish|pædhiyish]] || [[word:pædhiyi|pædhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhudhuyuth|padhudhuyuth]] || [[word:padhudhuyuj|padhudhuyuj]] || [[word:padhudhuyush|padhudhuyush]] || [[word:padhudhuyu|padhudhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhuyuth|padhuyuth]] || [[word:padhuyuj|padhuyuj]] || [[word:padhuyush|padhuyush]] || [[word:padhuyu|padhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhufyuth|padhufyuth]] || [[word:padhufyuj|padhufyuj]] || [[word:padhufyush|padhufyush]] || [[word:padhufyuf|padhufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padhuyuthu|padhuyuthu]] || [[word:padhuyuju|padhuyuju]] || [[word:padhuyushu|padhuyushu]] || [[word:padhuyuku|padhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padhuyuth|padhuyuth]] || [[word:padhuyuj|padhuyuj]] || [[word:padhuyush|padhuyush]] || [[word:padhuyu|padhuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padhuyuthul|padhuyuthul]] || [[word:padhuyujul|padhuyujul]] || [[word:padhuyushul|padhuyushul]] || [[word:padhuyukul|padhuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padhuyuthuthu|padhuyuthuthu]] || [[word:padhuyujuju|padhuyujuju]] || [[word:padhuyushushu|padhuyushushu]] || [[word:padhuyuku|padhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padhuyuthun|padhuyuthun]] || [[word:padhuyujun|padhuyujun]] || [[word:padhuyushun|padhuyushun]] || [[word:padhuyukun|padhuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padhuyuthuoro|padhuyuthuoro]] || [[word:padhuyujuoro|padhuyujuoro]] || [[word:padhuyushuoro|padhuyushuoro]] || [[word:padhuyukuoro|padhuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
